svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="niU6myyvtZo1XJKvTMya" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-384" dy="-167" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="720" pageHeight="560" background="#fbfaf7" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="none"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5d665d;" value="ONE POSTGRESQL TRANSACTION" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="280" x="40" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="begin" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#143d2b;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" value="BEGIN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="100" x="310" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf1e7;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="apply selected migrations and reference data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="270" x="225" y="132" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9f4e8;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="test the changed database
CALL pgmi_test()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="270" x="225" y="224" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gate" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b45309;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" value="tests
pass?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="295" y="316" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="commit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9f4e8;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#0f766e;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" value="COMMIT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="510" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rollback" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#5d665d;fontColor=#5d665d;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" value="ROLLBACK" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="90" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="capC" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=12;fontColor=#0f766e;" value="changes are live" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="490" y="488" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="capR" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=12;fontColor=#5d665d;" value="changes rolled back · exit 13" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="60" y="488" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="begin" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0" target="a1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="a1" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0" target="a2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="a2" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#b45309;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0" target="gate"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="gate" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#0f766e;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#fbfaf7;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=0" target="commit" value="yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="570" y="356" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="gate" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#5d665d;fontColor=#5d665d;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#fbfaf7;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=0" target="rollback" value="no"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="150" y="356" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cap" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=12;fontColor=#5d665d;" value="a failing test means the deployment changes never commit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="720" y="528" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
